meta.title: Old Hardware. New Life. | Computer Repair & Linux in Switzerland
meta.description: Buy refurbished IT, browse community listings, and find technicians or repair shops for repairs.

hero.title: Old Hardware. New Life.
hero.lede: Buy verified refurbished IT or find help when your device needs repair.
hero.sublede: Swiss non-profit since 2003 — with a shop, community marketplace, workshop, and technician network.
hero.subtitle: Every year, 62 million tonnes of electronics end up in landfill. We're changing that — with a community that repairs, shares and learns together.

actions.heading: What would you like to do?
actions.subtitle: Buy, repair, learn, or contribute — start with the job you need done today.

sell.label: 01 / SHOP
sell.title: Need refurbished IT?
sell.subtitle: Verified devices from the RevampIT shop — local, transparent, and ready to use.

repair.label: 02 / REPAIR
repair.title: Computer broken?
repair.subtitle: Technicians and workshops near you can help — or offer repairs yourself.

learn.label: 03 / WORKSHOPS
learn.title: Want to learn something new?
learn.subtitle: Hands-on workshops on Linux, hardware repair, programming and AI.

proServices.text: We also offer professional {link}: computer repair, data recovery, Linux installation and web development.

community.heading: Join the Community
community.subtitle: Use it, contribute, or support — every bit counts.

volunteer.title: Volunteer
volunteer.desc: Share your knowledge as a volunteer technician

donate.title: Support
donate.desc: Donate devices or money to the association

membership.title: Become a member
membership.desc: Vote and actively shape the association

finalCta.heading: Need a device built to last?
finalCta.subtitle: The shop has verified refurbished IT. If something is broken, repair search connects you with suitable technicians and workshops.
finalCta.note: Device donations still live under Get involved.

newsletter.title: Stay up to date
newsletter.subtitle: Learn how we make technology sustainable. No spam — only content that matters.
